name: Chicken Parmigiana 2 C/p
recipeInstructions:
1. If using whole chicken breasts, cut into halves.
2. In a bowl, beat the egg with salt and pepper.
3. Dip the chicken in the egg mixture.
4. Coat the chicken with bread crumbs.
5. In a large skillet, sauté the chicken in butter until cooked through.
6. Arrange the chicken in a baking dish.
7. Pour pizza sauce over the chicken.
8. Sprinkle mozzarella cheese evenly over the top of the chicken and sauce.
9. Sprinkle Parmesan cheese on top.
10. Cover the dish with foil or lid.
11. Cook on low for 6 to 8 hours, until heated through.
12. Remove from heat and serve. Makes 6 servings.
